artifactFamilies.description: Document-level metadata: title, date, author, source URL, archive reference, PPW source ID mappings
artifactFamilies.notes: 36 documents imported in PPW #195-#197. PPW source ID mapping added in PPW #143 (7 of 36 mapped; 29 unmapped).

artifactFamilies.description: Source texts for Lincoln v4 core additions; text files for public-domain Lincoln documents
artifactFamilies.rightsNote: Lincoln's own writings (1838-1865) are public domain. Third-party commentary or translations require rights confirmation before import.

artifactFamilies.description: Segmented passages with stable sentence IDs (Stage 4A pipeline output)
artifactFamilies.notes: Requires PPW passage schema validation. Core-tier documents (28 confirmed) prioritised; validation-tier passage segmentation handled separately under PPW #199.

artifactFamilies.description: Lincoln metaphor cluster annotation outputs from Stage 4A: cluster membership, evidence strength, and inter-cluster relationships for all identified metaphor clusters (obligatory-frame, body-organic, wound-healing, sacrifice, covenant-over-freedom)
artifactFamilies.sourceLocation: ashitaka-emishi/lincoln-metaphor-analysis pipeline Stage 4A cluster annotation outputs
artifactFamilies.notes: Cluster profiles feed draft claim candidates (#145). Represent as PPW analysis artifacts with reviewStatus: draft. No cluster profile constitutes a PPW finding without passing the claim-promotion gate (Milestone 18, PPW #129).

artifactFamilies.description: Traceability links connecting source passages to cluster annotations to claim candidates — the passage → cluster → claim chain
artifactFamilies.notes: Structural link file created in PPW #142. Per-passage provenance links will be established as passage records and claims are imported in Milestone 16.

artifactFamilies.description: Draft claim candidates derived from metaphor cluster profiles; Stage 4A model scoring and cluster profiling outputs mapped to PPW claim schema
artifactFamilies.notes: Imported with reviewStatus: draft. No claim is promoted to a PPW finding without passing the claim-promotion gate (Milestone 18, PPW #129).

artifactFamilies.description: Stage 4H/4J human coding records, adjudication decisions, and inter-annotator agreement metrics from lincoln-metaphor-analysis reliability study
artifactFamilies.notes: Reference only in Milestone 16. Inform PPW review-gate design. Reliability sampling design adapted to PPW context in Milestone 19 (PPW #199). Raw human coding records remain in child repo.

artifactFamilies.description: Codebook, annotation guidelines, and methodology documentation from lincoln-metaphor-analysis
artifactFamilies.notes: Linked from PPW method note (PPW #146). Quarto structure not copied; child-repo docs remain canonical.
Child-repo-specific pipeline; do not import into PPW. Inform PPW pipeline design (Milestone 19).

artifactFamilies.description: Quarto research site pages for the lincoln-metaphor-analysis project
artifactFamilies.notes: Child-repo site remains live as primary publication. PPW will have its own Lincoln module page (PPW #175).
